productName: Honey Stixx - 2Pk - Crystal - God's Gifts X Permafrost
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of God's Gifts X Permafrost, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of pine, earthy, and woody, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
